threads.title: Sovereign Playback Stability
threads.description: Eradicated UI sync regressions and playback race conditions. IPC crash fix, state-preserving navigation, ghost mutex elimination, and bridge dedup hardening.
commits: 24dae15 [fix] Sovereign Playback Stability — IPC Crash Fix & Bridge Hardening
737774a [fix] Webview Runtime — State-Preserving Navigation & Ghost Mutex Fix
23418b7 [test] Harden test suite for Sovereign Playback & Bridge hardening changes
architecturalLaws: webview.options MUST be set before any setView() that can trigger postMessage()
SyncManager.setView() flushes synchronously — callers must ensure webview is initialized first
audioBridge is the sole authoritative status sink for engine lifecycle events
jumpToChapter() must preserve isPlaying intent — never force playback on navigation
MessageClient.ts filename must use capital M — Windows FS casing enforced via git mv

threads.title: Test Suite Infrastructure Repair
threads.description: 76 tests fail at setup with 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading config)' in vitest.setup.ts. Pre-existing on HEAD~1. Needs targeted mock config resolution before next release.
threads.notes: Confirmed pre-existing via git stash baseline comparison. Not introduced by T-001 work.
